content: 1 United States Marine Corps edit Upon completion of recruit training with the 1st Recruit Training Battalion, Recruit Training Regiment, Marine Corps Recruit Depot, San Diego , California, on July 20, 1967, Burke was transferred to the Marine Corps Base, Camp Pendleton , California
